keyPoints: Model-Based Software Analysis (MBASE) is used to analyze system behavior and requirements, this method helps to identify system defects early in the development process.
Black Box Testing (BBT) is used to test the software without knowing its internal workings, this method is useful for functional testing.
White Box Testing (WBT) is used to test the software by knowing its internal workings, this method is useful for structural testing.
Grey Box Testing (GBT) is used to test the software with partial knowledge of its internal workings, this method is useful for performance testing.
Agile Methodology is an iterative and incremental approach to software development, it helps to deliver software faster and with higher quality.
Agile Methodology emphasizes on continuous testing and improvement, it helps to identify defects early and fix them quickly.
Agile Methodology uses automated testing tools to test the software, this helps to reduce testing time and effort.
Agile Methodology encourages collaboration and communication among team members, this helps to ensure that software meets the required standards.
